metadata.title: Outliner
metadata.description: Work with your lists like in Workflowy or RoamResearch.

regex.source: Notice(`The item cannot be moved. The page content changed during the move.`, 5000)
regex.target: Notice(`无法移动该项目。页面内容在移动过程中发生了变化。`, 5000)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to ${type} because folding is disabled. Please enable "Fold indent" in Obsidian settings.`, 5000)
regex.target: Notice(`由于折叠功能已禁用，无法${type}。请在Obsidian设置中启用“折叠缩进”。`, 5000)

regex.source: Notice(`To fully unload obsidian-outliner plugin, please restart the app`, 5000)
regex.target: Notice(`要完全卸载obsidian-outliner插件，请重新启动应用程序`, 5000)

regex.source: error(`Unable to parse list: expected list item, got empty line`)
regex.target: error(`无法解析列表：预期的列表项，得到空行`)

regex.source: error(`Unable to parse list: expected some indent, got no indent`)
regex.target: error(`无法解析列表: 预期缩进，但未缩进`)
name: "移动列表和子列表向上"
name: "向下移动列表和子列表"

regex.source: .setDesc("Don't let the cursor move to the bullet position.")
regex.target: .setDesc("不要让光标移动到圆点位置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make Tab and Shift-Tab behave the same as other outliners.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使Tab和Shift-Tab的行为与其他大纲视图相同。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make the Enter key behave the same as other outliners.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使回车键的行为与其他大纲工具相同。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Press the hotkey once to select the current list item. Press the hotkey twice to select the entire list.")
regex.target: .setDesc("按下快捷键一次可选择当前列表项。按下快捷键两次可选择整个列表。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Styles are only compatible with built-in Obsidian themes and may not be compatible with other themes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("样式仅与内置的Obsidian主题兼容，可能与其他主题不兼容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Open DevTools (Command+Option+I or Control+Shift+I) to copy the debug logs.")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开开发者工具（Command+Option+I 或 Control+Shift+I）以复制调试日志。")

regex.source: "bullet-and-checkbox": "Stick cursor out of bullets and checkboxes"
regex.target: "bullet-and-checkbox": "将光标放在项目符号和复选框之外"

regex.source: error(`Unable to parse list: expected indent "${expected}", got "${got}"`)
regex.target: error(`无法解析列表：预期缩进"${expected}"，得到"${got}"`)

regex.source: error(`Unable to parse list: expected list item or note, got "${line}"`)
regex.target: error(`无法解析列表：预期的列表项或注释，得到"${line}"`)
.setName("vim模式下使用o/O键插入项目符号")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a bullet when pressing o or O in Vim mode.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在Vim模式下按o或O时创建项目符号。")
.setName("增强 Ctrl+A 或 Cmd+A 的行为")
